ops.title: Verify cross-marketplace plugin dependency resolution on a clean profile
ops.description: Plan step 2 (gates consumer rollout): on a scratch Claude profile with local fixture marketplaces, record actual behavior of (a) fresh install of a plugin declaring a cross-marketplace dependency on captain-hook, (b) in-place update of an already-enabled plugin to a version that adds the dependency, (c) unknown captain-hook marketplace. Determines whether consumer READMEs need the marketplace-add line as primary install path.

ops.text: all three behaviors observed and recorded with CC version noted
go/no-go decision on dependency floor mechanics documented on this task
